intro.line1: I’m a designer and technologist working across audio-reactive visuals, interactive installation, and real-time systems, based in Naarm / Melbourne.
intro.line2: My practice sits between software engineering and live performance, building responsive systems for touring artists, brands, and cultural institutions. Recent work spans stage and festival visual design, music-video VFX, and interactive installation.
now.statement: Seeking experimentation and collaborative artistic exploration through the use of real-time technology.
availability: Available for commissions, collaborations, teaching, and speaking.
